biological_replicate: HEK293 cells that stably expressed wt Uba1 or xUba1
technical_replicate: We carried out affinity purification and proteomic screen three times.
experimental_design: xUba1-xUbcH7-xE6AP is an orthogonal cascade for the transfer of xUB
factor_value: We screened cell lines stably expressing xUba1, xUbcH7 and xE6AP
number_of_fractions: the tandem purification for OUT screens was performed under more stringent denaturing conditions.
